title: Agency-targeting scorecard; 25 citations; FY2024-2026 NIP/MIP figures
public_claim: Agency-targeting scorecard is a professional intelligence-career support packet with source-backed IC targeting logic.
distinctive_mechanism: It distinguishes best-shot-now from best-long-term-destination roles by combining agency targeting, DCIPS/STEM-cyber signals, Treasury OIA and other target offices, FY2024-2026 NIP/MIP budget context, White House and DoD MIP references, citations, and a multi-sheet targeting workbook.
use_value: It matters because career strategy is treated as an evidence-backed targeting problem rather than a generic list of agencies.
